channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [大V/权威] Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei calls OpenAI’s messaging around military deal ‘straight up lies,’ report says
item.description:
📊 Score: 255 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)

  • ⭐A-Authority:anthropic(+70)
  • ⭐A-Authority:openai(+70)
  • ❌Industry-Gate:fail(-30)

📄 Summary: Anthropic gave up its contract with the Pentagon over AI safety disagreements -- then, OpenAI swooped in....

item.title: [3] [模型算法] DuoMo: Dual Motion Diffusion for World-Space Human Reconstruction
item.description:
📊 Score: 117 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • L3-Tech:diffusion(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: We present DuoMo, a generative method that recovers human motion in world-space coordinates from unconstrained videos with noisy or incomplete observations. Reconstructing such motion requires solving a fundamental trade-off: generalizing from diverse and noisy video inputs while maintaining global motion consistency. Our approach addresses this pr...

item.title: [4] [模型算法] Saarthi for AGI: Towards Domain-Specific General Intelligence for Formal Verification
item.description:
📊 Score: 99 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L3-Tech:rag(+15)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Saarthi is an agentic AI framework that uses multi-agent collaboration to perform end-to-end formal verification. Even though the framework provides a complete flow from specification to coverage closure, with around 40% efficacy, there are several challenges that need to be addressed to make it more robust and reliable. Artificial General Intellig...

item.title: [5] [模型算法] COP-GEN: Latent Diffusion Transformer for Copernicus Earth Observation Data -- Generation Stochastic by Design
item.description:
📊 Score: 94 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L3-Tech:diffusion(+15)
  • L3-Tech:transformer(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Earth observation applications increasingly rely on data from multiple sensors, including optical, radar, elevation, and land-cover products. Relationships between these modalities are fundamental for data integration but are inherently non-injective: identical conditioning information can correspond to multiple physically plausible observations. T...

item.title: [6] [模型算法] Type-Aware Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Dependency Closure for Solver-Executable Industrial Optimization Modeling
item.description:
📊 Score: 94 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L3-Tech:retrieval(+15)
  • L3-Tech:rag(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Automated industrial optimization modeling requires reliable translation of natural-language requirements into solver-executable code. However, large language models often generate non-compilable models due to missing declarations, type inconsistencies, and incomplete dependency contexts. We propose a type-aware retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)...
